# Bash sandbox example

<!-- source: 12-cost-security.qmd sandbox paragraph (currently 2 sentences) — needs
     expansion into an actual worked example, verified hands-on by the author. -->

A concrete example of restricting what an agent's shell/file access can touch.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge setting up a sandbox restriction and confirming the agent can't escape it.
:::
